data.title: LPL Financial to report Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 30 after market close, with conference call at 5 p.m. ET. Visit investor.lpl.com/events for details.
data.description: San Diego-based LPL Financial Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LPLA) disclosed plans to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 post-market closure on Thursday, October 30. The parent company of LPL Financial LLC will conduct a conference call at 5 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the performance figures. Interested parties can access the call and its replay at investor.lpl.com/events.

data.title: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) to share Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 23 at 9 am ET, accompanied by a call and presentation.
data.description: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) will be conducting a conference call on Thursday, October 23, 2025, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time (8 a.m. Central Time) to talk about the financial results for the third quarter of 2025. These results will be made public earlier on the same day. The conference call will also include updates on the company's operations. For those interested, a presentation along with additional financial information will be accessible at darlingii.com/investors. To participate as a listener in the call, registration is required.

data.title: Enact Holdings to release Q3 earnings on Nov 5, will host conference call on Nov 6 at 8:00 a.m. ET. (Nasdaq: ACT)
data.description: Enact Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACT) based in Raleigh, North Carolina, revealed plans to unveil its third quarter financial performance on November 5, 2025, post-market closure. The conference call to delve into the specifics of the third quarter 2025 results is scheduled for November 6, 2025, commencing at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This event aims to provide investors and stakeholders with insights into Enact's performance in Q3, 2025.

data.title: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE: ZTS) declares $0.50 dividend/share for Q4 2025, payable on Dec 2 to holders as of Oct 31.
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, Zoetis Inc. (NYSE: ZTS) announced a dividend of $0.50 per share for Q4 2025. This dividend is set to be paid on December 2, 2025, to all shareholders of record of the company’s common stock as of October 31, 2025. Zoetis is a prominent animal health company with a dedication to enhancing animal care worldwide.

data.title: Walmart's 2025 Open Call welcomed over 500 entrepreneurs pitching U.S.-made products to over 100 businesses received Golden Tickets for sale in stores and online.
data.description: Walmart hosted its 12th annual Open Call where more than 500 entrepreneurs from 47 states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico presented products made in the US to Walmart and Sam's Club merchants. Over 100 businesses were awarded Golden Tickets, granting them the chance to sell their products in physical stores and online. This event saw a significant turnout and highlighted the retail giant's commitment to supporting American businesses.

data.title: Diebold Nixdorf appoints Myers as Chief Revenue Officer and Radigan as Chief Administrative Officer to drive growth and innovation globally.
data.description: Diebold Nixdorf (NYSE: DBD) has announced the establishment of new positions aimed at driving growth, innovation, and efficiency within its global sales and administrative departments. The company, headquartered in NORTH CANTON, Ohio, unveiled these roles on October 9, 2025. Diebold Nixdorf is a key player in revolutionizing banking and retail experiences on a worldwide scale.

data.title: Century Communities is building a 318-acre community near Katy, TX offering affordable homes with amenities like lakes, pickleball courts, rec center, and trails in Houston's west metro area.
data.description: A developing area in the west metro of Houston is set to introduce a new community that will provide affordable housing options. This neighborhood will offer various recreational amenities, including lakes, pickleball courts, a recreation center, and trails. On October 9, 2025, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a prominent national homebuilder, announced this project. This initiative aims to cater to the growing demand for housing in Houston's booming west metro area. Residents will have access to a range of facilities while enjoying the affordability of the homes being developed in this community.

data.title: Horizon Copper shareholders and warrantholders vote in favor of plan of arrangement with Royal Gold, meeting held on Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on October 9, 2025, Horizon Copper Corp. (TSXV: HCU) (OTCQB: HNCUF) announced the outcomes of the Special Meeting of Securityholders. The meeting, held today, revealed important voting statistics.

data.title: ANCC reveals findings of Magnet® 3.0 study, affirming Magnet® designation impact & suggesting opportunities for model evolution.
data.description: Recent research highlights the positive effects of Magnet® designation on outcomes, emphasizing the need to adapt the Magnet Model to contemporary healthcare settings and workforce needs. The American Nurses Credentialing Center (ANCC) disclosed these insights on Oct. 9, 2025. This emphasizes the importance of Magnet® designation in improving patient care quality. The study results underscore the necessity of updating the Magnet Model to align with current healthcare practices and demands, indicating a shift in nursing strategies within care environments.

data.title: Teamsters Local 30 and Rep. DeLuzio rally to keep New Kensington Express and Primacy Care facility open in PA.
data.description: In New Kensington, Pennsylvania, on October 9, 2025, health care workers from Teamsters Local 30 stood up against an illegal threat to shut down the local clinic. They joined forces with local elected officials and gathered at Allegheny Health Network's (AHN) New Kensington Express and Primary Care facility. This unified front comes as a response to the challenges faced by the clinic, and the need to protect essential health services. The collective action underlines the significance of the clinic, with a specific focus on maintaining access for the community. The rallying health care workers and officials have highlighted the importance of the clinic's presence, especially in the current climate. This collaborative effort showcases a strong stance against the closure, emphasizing the critical role the clinic plays in providing care to the area.

data.title: Eaton's smart factory in Changzhou, China, joins World Economic Forum's Global Lighthouse Network for exceptional performance.
data.description: Eaton (NYSE: ETN) announced that its smart factory in Changzhou, China has been designated a Lighthouse by the World Economic Forum (WEF). As part of the Global Lighthouse Network initiated in 2018, this recognition highlights manufacturing sites that excel in productivity, supply chain resilience, customer centricity, sustainability, and talent management. These elite factories are honored for their outstanding performance, with Eaton’s facility standing out for its exceptional achievement in customer satisfaction.

data.title: DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) to present at LD Micro Main Event Investor Conference on Oct 20, 2025 at 11:30am PST; Art Zeile, CEO to speak and hold meetings. Event from Oct 19-22 in San Diego, CA.
data.description: DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) revealed plans to attend the LD Micro Main Event Investor Conference on October 20, 2025. During this event, Art Zeile, the CEO, is set to present on Monday, October 20th at 11:30 a.m. PST and will engage in individual meetings with investors throughout the day. The conference is scheduled from October 19 to 22, 2025, at the Hotel Del Coronado in San Diego, CA. Additionally, a webcast of the presentation will be made available.

data.title: Levi Strauss & Co. reports strong third-quarter 2025 results, CEO says pivot to DTC driving financial growth.
data.description: In San Francisco today, Levi Strauss & Co. revealed their financial results for the third quarter concluding on August 31, 2025, reporting a robust performance. The company (NYSE: LEVI) saw significant growth due to their shift towards a direct-to-consumer (DTC) focus and expanding as a denim lifestyle retailer. Michelle Gass, the President and CEO of Levi Strauss & Co., expressed enthusiasm about their progress stating, "We delivered another very strong quarter as our pivot to becoming a DTC-first, head-to-toe denim lifestyle retailer is driving a meaningful inflection in our financial performance." The company is increasing their full-year outlook following positive performance across various sales channels, market segments, and product categories.

data.title: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) to report Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 30 after market close, with investor call at 2 p.m. Pacific Time.
data.description: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), the premier connectivity cloud company based in San Francisco, is set to release its third-quarter financial results for the period ending September 30, 2025, after the U.S. market closes on Thursday, October 30, 2025. An investor conference call will follow at 2:00 p.m. Pacific time (5:00 p.m. Eastern time) on the same day to delve into the results. Those interested can join the call by dialing +1 (646) 968-2727 or toll-free at +1 (888) 596-42.

data.title: Paramount Group (NYSE: PGRE) to release Q3 2025 financial results on October 29, 2025, after NYSE trading hours.
data.description: In New York, Paramount Group, Inc. (NYSE: PGRE) disclosed plans to submit its quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the period concluding on September 30, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company will unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 on October 29, 2025, post the closing of trading activities on the NYSE. Noteworthy is the Company's recent Agreement and Plan of Merger, which was agreed upon on September 17, 2025.

data.title: Camden Property Trust to announce Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 6, with conference call on Nov 7 at 10AM CT. Dial (888) 317-6003 for domestic, (412) 317-6061 for international. Webcast available at investors.camdenliving.com.
data.description: Houston-based real estate investment trust, Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT), plans to unveil its third quarter 2025 earnings after the market ends on November 6, 2025. A conference call will be conducted by management on November 7, 2025, at 10:00 AM Central Time. For interested participants, the domestic dial-in number is (888) 317-6003, while the international dial-in number is (412) 317-6061. The passcode for the call is 7955356, and a webcast of the event can be accessed at https://investors.camdenliving.com.

data.title: Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE: TPL) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5, 2025, with conference call on Nov 6, 2025 at 10:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: In Dallas, Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE: TPL) revealed plans to unveil its third-quarter 2025 financial outcomes post-market on Wednesday, November 5, 2025. Additionally, a conference call is set for Thursday, November 6, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Those interested can access a webcast of the call via the Investors section on the company's website, www.texaspacific.com. Join the live broadcast at the specified time on the site.

data.title: Fluor sells 15M Class A shares of NuScale Power for $605M. NuScale shares rose 300% since going public in May 2022.
data.description: Fluor Corporation, based in Irving, Texas, has finalized the sale of 15 million shares of Class A common stock of NuScale Power Corporation (NYSE: SMR) converted in August 2025, generating $605 million in net proceeds. By leveraging existing tax attributes, the company anticipates minimizing cash taxes linked to the transactions. Notably, NuScale's shares have surged over 300% since their initial public offering at $10.00 per share in May 2022. Moving forward, Fluor Corporation plans to utilize these funds for...

data.title: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) declares a quarterly cash dividend of $.25 per share, payable on Nov 26, 2025.
data.description: In Los Angeles, the board of directors of KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $.25 per share for the Company’s common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on November 26, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as such by November 13, 2025. KB Home, known as one of the largest and most reputable homebuilders in the United States, operates in 49 markets. Over its history of more than 65 years, the company has constructed close to 700,000 quality homes, securing its position as the top-ranked national homebuilder according to customer satisfaction.

data.title: Donna M. Brester recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for contributions in critical nursing care.
data.description: A nurse named Donna M. Brester, who holds various qualifications including MSN, RN, CCRN, NPDS, has been recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for her work in Critical Nursing Care. The acknowledgment was featured in The Inner Circle and highlights Donna's role as a Compassionate Caregiver and Advocate. This news was released on October 9, 2025, in Kensington, Connecticut.
